query:
UPDATE products
SET sheetRowNumber = 922,
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE batchNo = '01900000012';

UPDATE station_tasks st
JOIN products p ON p.id = st.productId
SET st.metadata = JSON_SET(
      JSON_SET(
        JSON_SET(
          JSON_SET(
            st.metadata,
            '$.ePhotoSyncStatus', 'background_completed'
          ),
          '$.ePhotoSyncMessage', 'E 站照片已透過 API 補同步到 Google Drive，採購單連結已回寫'
        ),
        '$.eFrontPhotoUrl', 'https://drive.google.com/file/d/1lGRoztNS60ToidzaTB8ZwW07TdN8V6kd/view'
      ),
      '$.eBackPhotoUrl', 'https://drive.google.com/file/d/1gf9QVEkpto_Z_f8CzIBGWBm3vKDTigyj/view'
    ),
    st.updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE st.stationCode = 'E'
  AND st.stationTaskStatus = 'completed'
  AND p.batchNo = '01900000012';

SELECT p.batchNo,
       p.sheetRowNumber,
       JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus')) AS e_photo_sync_status,
       JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncMessage')) AS e_photo_sync_message
FROM station_tasks st
JOIN products p ON p.id = st.productId
WHERE st.stationCode = 'E'
  AND st.stationTaskStatus = 'completed'
  AND p.batchNo = '01900000012';

SELECT JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus')) AS e_photo_sync_status,
       COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM station_tasks
WHERE stationCode = 'E'
  AND stationTaskStatus = 'completed'
  AND JSON_EXTRACT(metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus') IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus'))
ORDER BY row_count DESC;
